name: Subur Tiasa Holdings Bhd
summary: Subur Tiasa Holdings Bhd is a Malaysia-based company engaged in timber extraction, reforestation, and oil palm cultivation. The company is involved in the manufacturing and sale of plywood, veneer, sawn timber, and other wood products, as well as the production of crude palm oil and palm kernel. Subur Tiasa Holdings is headquartered in Sibu, Sarawak, Malaysia.
